title: Supply Chain Manager - Gati - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Gati - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Gati. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
